channel.title: davisonio/awesome-gif Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: davisonio/awesome-gif Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2020
item.description:
Swift

  • SwiftyGifstars1.4k - High performance & easy to use Gif engine

item.title: davisonio/awesome-gif Feb 3rd - Feb 9th, 2020
item.description:
C++

  • Gif-hstars365 - C++ one-header library for the creation of animated GIFs

    • Utilities

  • Gifcurrystars867 - Open-source, Haskell-built editor for GIF makers.

item.title: davisonio/awesome-gif Jul 22nd - Jul 28th, 2019
item.description:
GUI

  • VineGifRstars83 - Mac app to turn Vine videos into GIFs

    • General Tools

  • GraphicsMagick - GraphicsMagick is usually faster than ImageMagick.
  • MoviePy - Python module for video editing.

    • Utilities

  • Gifshotstars3.7k - create animated GIFs from media by Yahoo. (demo)

item.title: davisonio/awesome-gif Oct 29th - Nov 4th, 2018
item.description:
Utilities

  • Gifsstars1.6k - storage place for GIFs

item.title: davisonio/awesome-gif Sep 3rd - Sep 9th, 2018
item.description:
Utilities

  • gifskistars2.1k - High-quality GIF encoder based on libimagequant.

item.title: davisonio/awesome-gif Mar 12th - Mar 18th, 2018
item.description:
Utilities

  • Gifsiclestars938 - lossy GIF compressor

    • Swift

  • SwiftGifstars1.3k - UIImage extension with GIF support

    • Online Tools

  • Vid2gif - Video to GIF by imgur

item.title: davisonio/awesome-gif Jun 5th - Jun 11th, 2017
item.description:
Online Tools

  • EzGif - Online GIF maker and image editor

    • Community

  • Giphy.com
  • 9gag.com/gif

    • Miscellaneous

  • Why is the GIF I created so slow? - Using ImageMagick to solve problems concerning GIF speed.

    • GUI

  • AnimatedGifstars174 - Mac Screensaver for playing GIFs

item.title: davisonio/awesome-gif Jan 30th - Feb 5th, 2017
item.description:
Utilities

  • Gifsocketsstars1.7k - Real Time communication library using Animated GIFs as a transport
  • gif-machinestars55 - GIF creation from Youtube videos
  • Screengifstars1.3k - Create animated GIF screencasts
  • vnc-over-gifstars512 - Serves screen updates as animated GIF over http
  • Tty2gifstars154 - record scripts and their outputs into both binary and GIF formats
  • Giftopprstars36 - Sync your favourite GIFs with Dropbox
  • Gifit (the other one)stars11 - Get a search resulting giphy GIF in markdown in stdout, ala $ gifit kittens.
  • Gifgenstars403 - Simple high quality GIF encoding
  • Gififystars5.7k - Convert any video file to an optimized animated GIF
  • Gifify (not the same)stars1.1k - convert screen recording into GIF
  • X-gifstars2k - a web component for flexible GIF playback
  • GifW00tstars816 - javascript web recorder
  • gifstreamingstars149 - Live video streaming server
  • gifdeckstars95 - Convert your SlideShares into animated GIFs
  • Gifbotstars35 - GIF search for Slack
  • Gif-camerastars20 - create animated GIFs using webcam
  • Giflinestars63 - Chrome extension to put GIFs in your emails
  • Gifdropstars38 - Create a repository for your collection of gif images
  • Gh-gifstars21 - NodeGH plugin for commenting on pull requests/issues using GIF reactions
  • Gifitstars116 - Chrome extension to make a GIF from a YouTube video
  • Ccapture.jsstars2.6k - Capture animations created with HTML5 canvas
  • Kap - Beautiful open-source app to capture your screen and export to GIF.

    • ActionScript

  • Flash Animated GIF Librarystars57 - AS3 library for playing Animated GIFs in Flash

    • C++

  • Node-gifstars202 - C++ library to make GIF
  • OfxGifEncoderstars94 - C++ openframeworks addon to export animated GIFs

    • Haxe

  • Gifstars35 - Haxe GIF encoder

    • Java

  • GifViewstars80 - android library to deal with GIF
  • Android-GifStitchstars40 - create and share animated GIFs
  • Android-gif-drawablestars8.8k - Views and Drawable for displaying animated GIFs on Android
  • gifanimateddrawablestars220 - Use an animated GIF as an Android Drawable
  • Gif Movie Viewstars456 - Android View widget for displaying GIF animations
  • GifImageViewstars1.1k - Android ImageView that handles animated GIF images
  • Gif-animationstars169 - Processing library to play and export GIF
  • Android-gif-encoderstars292 - animated GIF encoder for Android
  • GIFDroidstars100 - Android video to GIF converter

    • JavaScript

  • Giffferstars725 JavaScript library that prevents the autoplaying of the animated GIFs
  • Gifplayerstars453 - jquery plugin to play and stop animated GIFs
  • node-gifystars273 - Javascript convert videos to GIFs using ffmpeg and gifsicle
  • Gifencoderstars388 - Server side animated GIF generation for node.js
  • Gif.jsstars4k - Javascript - create GIF from the DOM
  • Omggifstars547 - Javascript - GIF 89a encoder and decoder
  • Animated_GIFstars206 - Javascript library for creating animated GIFs
  • Jsgifstars486 - JavaScript GIF parser and player
  • Gif-videostars66 - Javascript Convert a GIF image into an HTML5-ready video
  • Gif-playerstars61 - On-demand GIF loader/player in Javascript
  • GifgifLab-facestars7 - Facial-emotion detectors
  • node-youtubestars171 - Youtube to snapshots and GIFs.

    • Objective-C

  • SvGifViewstars84 - iOS load and display GIF
  • GifHUDstars159 - iOS progress hud for displaying only animated GIF images
  • AnimatedGifExamplestars40 - iOS animated and transparent GIFs
  • AnimatedGIFImageSerializationstars1.1k - decodes an UIImage from Animated GIFs image data
  • UIimage from GIFstars867 - UIImage category that loads animated GIFs
  • GIFRefreshControlstars295 - "Twitter music" and "Yahoo! Weather" like pull-to-refresh control
  • UIImageView-PlayGIFstars431 - UIImageView category/subclass for playing GIF
  • FLAnimatedImagestars7.6k - Gif engine for iOS by FlipBoard
  • Animated-GIF-iPhonestars130 - Support for Animated GIF on iOS
  • UzysAnimatedGifPullToRefreshstars1.4k - PullToRefresh using animated GIF to any scrollView
  • Video-Background GIFstars148 - iOS Video Background GIF
  • OLImageViewstars874 - iOS OLImage and OLImageView support for animated GIFs

    • GUI

  • GifProstars43 - GIF encoder for Mac
  • Glyph - tool for generating seamlessly looping GIFs and cinemagraphs from videos
  • GIFsstars604 - Mac App for finding GIFs
  • Qgifer

    • Hosting

  • Gfycat - Maximum GIF/video length: 15 seconds. Maximum file upload is 300Mb
  • Imgur - Maximum file upload is 50MB

    • Online Tools

  • Giflr - A web app for making or remixing animated GIFs
  • Gif.gf - Provide a matching GIF for your face

    • Niche

  • Starwars-dot-gifstars487 - Python script to generate GIFs from star wars

    • PHP

  • GifCreatorstars306 - PHP class that creates animated GIF from multiple images
  • Spacer.gifstars16 - PHP script offering spacer.gif 1x1
  • GifFrameExtractorstars166 - PHP class that separates all the frames of an animated GIF

    • Swift

  • Gifustars2.5k - animated GIF support for iOS in Swift

    • General Tools

  • ImageMagick

    • Community

  • Educational Gifs

item.title: davisonio/awesome-gif Jul 13th - Jul 19th, 2015
item.description:
Youtube video to GIF

  • Download it via youtube-dl and then convert it.

    • General Tools

  • FFmpeg

    • High quality GIF

  • Generate a palette :
